books.synopsis: Sample chapter used to seed the reader during development. The story follows Sid and Felise as their personal duel takes place inside the terror of a much vaster cataclysm.

title.target: Dì èr líng líng yī zhāng: Qū zhé de dào lù

books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.synopsis: Treasure Island is a classic adventure novel that follows young Jim Hawkins as he embarks on a perilous journey to find buried pirate treasure, encountering treachery and danger along the way.

title.target: Dì yī zhāng: Lǎo hǎi dào
